channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ refuses judge's request to confirm 'anti-weaponization' fund is terminated
item.description: A senior Justice Department official called the judge's demand for a declaration on the fund's status 'unnecessary.'

item.title: Two trains collide in England, causing multiple injuries, UK official says
item.description: One passenger told the BBC, 'I felt like I'd been in a bomb explosion' after the collision north of London.

item.title: James Burrows, co-creator of 'Cheers' and prolific TV director, dies at 85
item.description: Burrows directed over 1,000 TV episodes, including every episode of the original 'Will & Grace.'

item.title: DOJ declines to provide signed declaration that 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' is defunct
item.description: The DOJ refused to issue a signed statement from acting AG Todd Blanche confirming it no longer plans to pursue Trump's 'Anti-Weaponization Fund.'
